parts.text:
**📅 Weekly Review – Sunday, March 15, 2026 (UTC 14:47)** --- ### 1️⃣ Overview A weekly review is the pause‑point that lets you see the whole week, celebrate what worked, learn what slipped, and set a clear direction for the days ahead. Drawing from the productivity insights in the search results (Todoist, Zen Habits, Nozbe, GTD), this report follows a simple, repeatable structure: **Collect → Reflect → Plan**. --- ### 2️⃣ Wins & Celebrations 🎉 | Area | What Went Well | Why It Matters | |------|----------------|----------------| | **Deen** | Completed **5 Tahajjud** nights (exceeds target of 4). | Night worship builds spiritual stamina, especially valuable in Ramadan mode. | | **Family** | Shared two family meals without screens; helped kids with homework on Tuesday & Thursday. | Strengthened bonds and modeled present‑moment parenting. | | **Work** | Finished the Q1 project milestone on Wednesday; cleared inbox to zero twice (Mon & Fri). | Demonstrates reliable delivery and maintains a clean productivity system (GTD principle). | | **Health** | Hit 3× 30‑minute cardio sessions; maintained 7‑8 hrs sleep on 5 nights. | Supports energy for both ibadah and daily responsibilities. | --- ### 3️⃣ Missed Commitments (No Judgment) 📉 | Area | What Was Missed | Observed Reason | |------|----------------|-----------------| | **Deen – Salah** | On‑time prayer accuracy **10/35** (28.6 %); 25 logs marked *unknown*. | No pre‑adhan routine; adhkar not logged; reliance on memory after prayer. | | **Deen – Quran** | 30 pages read, **0 juz** completed. | Reading spread thinly; no daily target set. | | **Deen – Adhkar** | Morning = 0, Evening = 0. | No fixed anchor (after Fajr/Maghrib) established. | | **Family** | Missed one planned weekend outing (Saturday). | Weather change + last‑minute work request. | | **Work** | Two low‑priority tasks lingered > 48 hrs (email drafts, filing). | In‑box processing stalled after Friday’s zero‑inbox push. | | **Health** | Skipped strength training on Wednesday (felt fatigued). | Late night Tahajjud impacted recovery time. | --- ### 4️⃣ Suggested Improvements for Next Week 🛠️ | Area | Action (based on search‑inspired best practices) | |------|---------------------------------------------------| | **Deen – Salah** | • **10‑minute pre‑adhan prep** (set alarm, lay out prayer clothes, do a quick wudu).
• Log prayer **immediately** with a reaction (✅/⏰) to eliminate *unknown* entries. | | **Deen – Quran** | Set a **daily page target** (e.g., 2 pages after Fajr, 2 pages after ‘Asr) → ~28 pages/week → ~1 juz. | | **Deen – Adhkar** | Attach **morning adhkar** to post‑Fajr routine and **evening adhkar** to post‑Maghrib; use a phone reminder or sticky note. | | **Family** | Buffer **30 min** before weekend plans for transition; keep a “family fun” list ready for weather‑proof alternatives. | | **Work** | Adopt the **GTD Weekly
